positive: A vibrant, stylized composition of a friendly astronaut floating among abstract nebulae and bioluminescent space flora. The astronaut is depicted in a simplified, retro-futuristic suit, performing a joyful, dynamic pose. The background nebula uses deep indigos, cosmic purples, and vibrant teal accents, contrasting sharply with glowing cyan and lime green elements from the flora. High contrast, clean vector aesthetic mixed with cosmic oil painting textures. Flat composition ideal for screen printing on apparel, utilizing strong silhouettes and defined edges. Central composition, symmetrical focus. Graphic design style, kawaii-meets-retro-sci-fi.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grainy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, messy background, muted colors
